summary: Translation bug fix verification completed. All translation features working correctly - category names, product names, and icon dropdown translations are properly displaying in English when language is set to English.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Translation fix verified working. Categories and products display name_en when language is English.

1_pos_page_category_translation.description: Category names translate correctly on POS page
verified: Main Dishes (English) instead of الوجبات الرئيسية (Arabic)
1_pos_page_category_translation.implementation: getLocalizedName() function in POS.js line 77-81 returns name_en when lang === 'en'

2_pos_page_product_translation.description: Product names translate correctly on POS page
2_pos_page_product_translation.implementation: getLocalizedName() function used in line 1342 for product names

3_settings_category_translation.description: Settings page categories list shows translated names
verified: Main Dishes with Arabic subtitle (الوجبات الرئيسية)
3_settings_category_translation.implementation: Settings.js line 3156 uses: lang === 'en' ? (cat.name_en || cat.name) : cat.name

4_icon_dropdown_translation.description: Icon dropdown in Settings -> Categories shows translated icon names
verified: translations.js has English translations for all icons (lines 885-916)
Settings.js icon dropdown uses t() function for translation (lines 3074-3105)
Icons translate: قهوة -> Coffee, عصائر -> Juices, بيتزا -> Pizza, etc.
4_icon_dropdown_translation.implementation: SelectItem uses t('قهوة'), t('عصائر'), etc. which translates via translations.js

getLocalizedName_function.code: const getLocalizedName = (item, lang) => { if (!item) return ''; if (lang === 'en' && item.name_en) return item.name_en; return item.name || ''; };

screenshots_taken: 01_dashboard_english.png - Dashboard in English showing translated menu items
02_pos_english.png - POS page with English category and product names
25_categories_tab.png - Settings Categories showing English names with Arabic subtitles

language_switching.method: localStorage.setItem('app_language', 'en') or language buttons on login page
